results.justification: Meta LLaMA-2 already uses 'ghost attention' terminology with attention mechanism modification at training time; partial overlap but ghost-attention purpose differs (instruction retention vs ghost-head capacity).
Direct twin — harmonic constraint computed on attention head activations for hallucination reduction; both use 'harmonic constraint' + attention head loss.
Cordonnier 2020 explicitly shares K/Q projections between heads to reduce redundancy — same coupling mechanism, different motivation.
Predictable Q/K/V from 2-5 peer heads is the OBSERVATION that IGIL-DUAL-SYMPATHY exploits by adding explicit training pressure.
Intra-layer key-subspace alignment is the post-hoc mechanism IGIL-DUAL-SYMPATHY pre-trains for.
Below threshold — entropy is diagnostic, not coupling regularizer.
ABFT builds training objective on attention scores targeting induction-head emergence — same explicit-training-for-head-property paradigm.
Per-head loss-based gating is functionally equivalent to per-head coupling regularizer.
